column1: # port-tasks.tsv — dart-sass to ssg-sass porting task registry

column16: Phase 2 forcing-function reference. core_functions/string 47→122 (+75 cases). Remaining 33 spec failures span B001-B007 cross-cutting issues.
Phase 4 task. core_functions/list 129→139 (+10), global +11. Remaining 94 list-subdir failures map to B001/B004 + new HRX import resolution issues.

Phase 4 task. core_functions/map subdir 91→113/127 (71.7%→89.0%, +22 cases). Global +97 cases (4248→4345). Remaining 14 failures map to B004 (argument-arity validation, 10 cases), B006 (empty list rendering, 2 cases), and a NEW B-task for single-element non-bracketed comma list rendering (2 cases). Fixed Callable.overloadedFunction canonical-signature picker to prefer the longest named-slot signature so named-arg binding works for overloaded built-ins.

Phase 4 task. core_functions/math subdir 248→397/486 (51.0%→81.7%, +149 cases). Global +167 cases (4345→4512). Added module-variables wiring through EvaluateVisitor (math.$pi, math.$e, etc.). Fixed SerializeVisitor.writeNumberTo to use Long-range fuzzy-int check so large values like math.$pi * 1e15 serialize without 32-bit truncation. Added Callable.overloadedFunction canonical-sig fallout — named-arg binding for overloaded built-ins. Fixed hypot() to reject complex units with the same error text dart-sass raises from the calc path. Remaining 89 subdir failures: ~60 map to NEW B009 (Infinity/NaN → calc() wrapping), ~20 to B004 (arg arity), ~5 precision edge cases, ~4 HRX multi-file resolution.

Phase 4 task. core_functions/meta subdir 249→283/489 (50.9%→57.9%, +34 cases). Global +57 cases (4512→4569). Fixed type-of to recognise SassCalculation, feature-exists to match dart-sass's frozen _features set, inspect to use SerializeVisitor.serializeValue(v, inspect=true) so nested lists/maps/nulls render correctly, calc-name to return a quoted string, SassFunction.toString/SassMixin.toString to use callable.name (not the class-tagged toString). Added SerializeVisitor.serializeValue public entry point, inspect-aware formatList (empty/singleton/elementNeedsParens), inspect-aware formatMap (wraps list keys/values in parens), SassNull renders as 'null' in inspect mode. Remaining 206 failures map to parser bugs on meta.get-function(literal), SassColor literal-vs-generated tracking, Environment.functionValues leakage, binder not producing SassArgumentList for splat-only calls, and B004.

Phase 4 task. core_functions/selector subdir 2→415/899 (0.2%→46.2%, +413 cases). Global +424 cases (4569→4993). Switched from text-based to AST-based implementations: nest uses SelectorList.nestWithin, append uses prependParent + nestWithin, extend/replace use MutableExtensionStore.extendList with AllTargets/Replace modes, unify uses SelectorList.unify, is-superselector uses SelectorList.isSuperselector, simple-selectors uses CompoundSelector component accessor, parse round-trips through SelectorParser. Added missing functions is-superselector, simple-selectors, parse, replace. Fixed module/global naming (bare names in module; selector-* prefixed via withName in global; is-superselector and simple-selectors stay unprefixed). Fixed PseudoSelector.isSuperselector infinite recursion by returning false for unsupported pseudo/pseudo comparisons instead of recursing through CompoundSelector. Remaining 484 subdir failures are dominated by the full `_selectorPseudoIsSuperselector` logic from extend/functions.dart not yet ported (~200 cases on :is/:not/:has superselector rules) plus nested-selector edge cases.

column17: Phase 4 task. Full faithful port of environment.dart (~1153 dart LoC). Scoped variable/function/mixin stacks with lazy index caches; module storage (`_modules`, `_globalModules`, `_importedModules`, `_forwardedModules`, `_nestedForwardedModules`); `addModule`/`forwardModule(rule)`/`importForwards`/`_assertNoConflicts`/`_fromOneModule`; `scope(semiGlobal,when)`; `EnvironmentModule` with `_modulesByVariable` and `couldHaveBeenConfigured`. Visitor changes co-landed: `visitForwardRule` registers upstream as a Module via `forwardModule(module, rule)` rather than copying members; `_loadDynamicImport` uses `forImport()`+`importForwards()` when imports contain @use/@forward; `_runUserDefinedFunction`/`_invokeMixinCallable` switch to `captured.closure()` and push a fresh `scope()` so `$var: ...` in the body redirects to a local frame instead of writing through the captured env's shared global map; `visitVariableDeclaration` consults `_pendingConfig` on `!default` declarations at module root (no pre-seeding); `ForwardedView` show/hide checks moved to PREFIXED keys to match dart-sass `_forwardedMap`. Global sass-spec 4993→5053 (+60 cases). All 3 platforms green (JVM 781, JS 759, Native 759). Zero regressions.

column16: String literal escapes (\e000, \0308, etc.) should decode to codepoints at parse time, not survive as literal backslash sequences. Affects length/index/insert/slice tests with combining_character and private_use_character cases.
When the output contains non-ASCII characters, prepend `@charset \"UTF-8\";\\n`. Affects ~8 string tests plus many color/calc tests.
Single-element bracketed comma list `[a,]` is rendered as `[(a,)]` (extra parens). Fix the writeList path that handles separator+brackets+single-element.
BuiltInCallable invocations don't validate argument arity or unknown named arguments. error/too_many_args and error/wrong_name tests across all built-in modules.
toCssString hex escape \\hh needs trailing space when followed by hex-looking char. Currently emits \\0 where dart-sass emits \\0_(space).
list-separator() returns the wrong value for empty lists — should be 'comma' but emits 'separator(...)' debug form.
Quoted strings containing both quote types should flip to the other quote. Currently produces malformed output for `quote_unquoted_quote/double` and similar.

Single-element non-bracketed comma list `(1,)` should render as `1` (no parens, no trailing comma) when written via toCssString. Currently always emits `(N,)` for single-element comma lists. Affects keys.hrx!single, values.hrx!single, and similar list-from-map cases. Surfaced during T003 sass:map port.

Serialize non-finite SassNumbers (Infinity, -Infinity, NaN) as `calc(infinity)`, `calc(-infinity)`, `calc(NaN)`. For NaN with a unit, wrap as `calc(NaN * 1<unit>)`. Currently emits the raw Double.toString form. Affects ~60 cases in core_functions/math (pow, sqrt, log, sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, hypot) plus values/calculation paths. Surfaced during T004 sass:math port.

Port the full `_selectorPseudoIsSuperselector` algorithm from dart-sass extend/functions.dart: when comparing two pseudo selectors of the same name (`:is`, `:not`, `:has`, `:matches`, `:current`), their inner selector lists must be compared under the correct containment rules (positive pseudos use list-superselector, `:not` inverts it). ssg-sass currently returns false for all mismatched pseudo-name cases to avoid infinite recursion. Affects ~200 cases in core_functions/selector/is_superselector. Surfaced during T006 sass:selector port.
